name: lean_check
description: Check a Lean 4 proof attempt under a conservative policy and return structured diagnostics. This tool does not repair proofs.

name: shadowproof_validate
description: Translate a constrained natural-language or direct Lean proof attempt into Lean, run guarded repair iterations, and return Lean validation diagnostics and a certificate if accepted.

name: shadowproof_check_draft
description: Statically check an LLM DraftProposal for schema shape, theorem-lock drift, declared trust mismatches, and security policy. Does not run Lean.

name: shadowproof_validate_draft
description: Validate an LLM DraftProposal by checking theorem-lock/security constraints, running Lean, applying guarded repair when possible, and returning a certificate if Lean accepts.

name: shadowproof_draft_schema
description: Return the DraftProposal JSON Schema that the LLM should use when proposing Lean code.

name: shadowproof_record_outcome
description: Record a Lean rejection/repair/acceptance outcome into privacy-conscious local memory for future repair prompt optimization.

name: shadowproof_suggest_repair
description: Suggest ranked repair strategies for a Lean rejection using templates and local rejection memory.

name: shadowproof_compile_repair_prompt
description: Compile compact LLM-facing repair instructions from Lean diagnostics, theorem fingerprint, and learned local memory.

name: shadowproof_memory_stats
description: Return summary statistics for local ShadowProof rejection memory.

name: shadowproof_env_info
description: Capture Lean/Lake/Mathlib environment metadata for versioned validation certificates.

name: shadowproof_eval
description: Run a ShadowProof evaluation suite and report metrics: tokens per accepted proof, repair turns per accepted proof, and false theorem-drift escape rate.

name: shadowproof_optimize_suggest
description: Suggest an optimized policy action for a company/model/domain/subfield context using learned offline/online optimization data.

name: shadowproof_optimize_record
description: Record an optimization event with context, action, outcome, and reward for future policy training.

name: shadowproof_optimize_train
description: Train a simple contextual bandit-style policy from recorded optimization events.

name: shadowproof_optimize_stats
description: Return optimization memory and policy statistics.

name: shadowproof_optimize_export_policy
description: Export the current learned optimization policy for deployment/versioning.

name: shadowproof_list_domains
description: List available mathematical domain packs for retrieval and formalization guidance.

name: shadowproof_get_domain_pack
description: Return a specific domain pack with imports, tactics, theorem names, notation notes, and theorem-drift traps.

name: shadowproof_retrieve_mathlib
description: Retrieve Mathlib/domain-pack candidates for a natural-language theorem or Lean diagnostic query.

name: shadowproof_compile_formalization_context
description: Compile prompt-ready Mathlib/domain context for a frontier model before it emits DraftProposal JSON.

name: shadowproof_index_mathlib
description: Index local Mathlib/Lean source files into a lightweight JSONL retrieval index.

name: shadowproof_retrieve_for_diagnostics
description: Extract a retrieval query from Lean diagnostics/theorem fingerprint and retrieve relevant Mathlib/domain-pack candidates.

name: shadowproof_compile_repair_context
description: Compile retrieval-augmented repair context from theorem fingerprint, Lean diagnostics, and Mathlib/domain retrieval.

name: shadowproof_shadowhott_state
description: Build explicit ShadowHoTT state with truth/falsity/boundary valuation, obstructions, patch morphisms, and verdict.

name: shadowproof_shadowhott_audit
description: Audit ShadowHoTT state invariants: normalized valuation, blocking obstructions, theorem-safe patch morphisms.

name: shadowproof_regression_suite
description: Run the full ShadowProof bridge regression suite across ShadowHoTT routing, retrieval, prompt efficiency, theorem-drift traps, and Lean validation cases.

name: shadowproof_config_check
description: Return resolved commercial configuration, sandbox, and deployment settings.

name: shadowproof_product_readiness
description: Report commercial readiness gaps, release gates, and next steps.

name: shadowproof_metrics_report
description: Summarize local ShadowProof metrics.

name: shadowproof_prometheus_metrics
description: Export ShadowProof metrics in Prometheus text format.

name: shadowproof_retention_sweep
description: Apply the configured data-retention policy to local JSONL tenant storage.

name: shadowproof_create_review_packet
description: Create a human-review packet with theorem fingerprint, diagnostics, Lean diff, certificate, and ShadowHoTT state.

name: shadowproof_lean_worker_check
description: Check Lean code through the configured local/http/disabled Lean worker.

name: shadowproof_training_capacity_plan
description: Offline trainable-parameter capacity planner for buyer-side model/training integration.

name: shadowproof_demorgan_symmetry
description: Report executable De Morgan order-two coordinate symmetry and Lean formalization path.
